name: Okra Curry!
recipeIngredient: Cut lengthwise (chop off the top and discard) Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. For the masala: Roast peanuts and powder coarsely. Add a pinch of sugar, chili powder to taste, and salt to taste. Optionally add cumin powder, coriander (coriander) powder, and a pinch of asafoetida.
2. Heat oil in a fry-pan (at least 3-4 tbsp). Optionally add mustard seeds and wait for them to pop.
3. Fry onion until golden brown. Add okra and stir-fry until the okra is tender (cooked). Mix in the masala well until it begins looking brown.
This makes a delicious dry curry.
